ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "data_vendor" TEXT /* Data vendor or source of the historical price data */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "buy_commission" REAL /* Commission amount for buying trades */,
  "sell_commission" REAL /* Commission amount for selling trades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, technical analysis) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
